name: rabi-codex-context
description: Bind an individual Codex session to a Rabi persona context without duplicating role knowledge.

interface.shortDescription: Bind one Codex session to one Rabi persona.
interface.longDescription: Inject bounded persona, plan, memory, and role-skill context only after an explicit real-session binding.
interface.defaultPrompt: Bind this Codex session to my Rabi persona and report the active context.
